episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 369: Wrenn & Angelic Elspeth
episode.description: James and Cliff walk you through all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and go over the likely popularity and use cases of Wrenn & Realmbreaker and Archangel Elspeth.
